To:
Mum
Dear Mum,
Thank you ever so much for being the best Mum ever. I hope you have had a wonderful day and enjoy Benson Boone.

Using AI to code this was surprisingly hard, so I apologise that this has taken a while to do, but hopefully you can appreciate the effort to deliver you a card more uniquely.
Love Will xxx
